title: Management Information Systems Mission and Vision
content:
Management Information Systems Mission and Vision

Mission:

To educate individuals with an ethical and sustainability-oriented approach, who can bridge the gap between technology and business, lead digital transformation, and adopt strong analytical thinking and an interdisciplinary perspective in the field of Management Information Systems.

Vision:

To become a pioneering center of education and research that integrates information technologies and business management and is recognized both nationally and internationally for educating innovative, entrepreneurial, and globally aware management information systems professionals.
